subcommands.name: diff
subcommands.description: Diff the old and new versions of a binary to see what sizes changed

subcommands.name: dominators
subcommands.description: Compute and display the dominator tree for a binary's call graph

subcommands.name: garbage
subcommands.description: Find and display code and data that is not transitively referenced by any exports or public functions

subcommands.name: help
subcommands.description: Prints this message or the help of the given subcommand(s)

subcommands.name: monos
subcommands.description: List the generic function monomorphizations that are contributing to code bloat

subcommands.name: paths
subcommands.description: Find and display the call paths to a function in the given binary's call graph

subcommands.name: top
subcommands.description: List the top code size offenders in a binary
